full_text: Prioritize utility values for progressed disease in advanced/metastatic NSCLC. Favor studies relevant to US setting and later lines of therapy. Capture rationale and limitations for each selected publication.

sections.heading: Objective
sections.content: Find health state utility values suitable for HE model parameterization in advanced NSCLC.

sections.heading: Selection Notes
sections.content: Prioritize recency, relevance to progressed disease, and data quality; document limitations.
